body.p: Click on the Settings icon to open the configuration panel.
Execute the following command to start the database service.
You can leverage this API to integrate with external systems.
The cluster supports multiple workloads such as databases, web servers, etc.
You can not delete resources that are currently in use.
In order to apply the changes, restart the pod.
Use this command to kill the process running on port 8080.
The system will terminate the session after 30 minutes of inactivity.
